title: Source
description: An engine-backed database asset. spec.engine is an open discriminator pairing with an engine-named nested block (e.g. spec.postgres), so new engines bring their own fields without a core schema change. Role-neutral despite the historical name: a Source is the origin of cdc-mode Bindings and a legitimate target of sink-mode ones.

engine.description: Open-ended engine discriminator (postgres, mysql, ...). Names the sibling engine-specific block.

providerRef.description: The Provider realizing this source. Required unless external.

external.description: The database lives outside the platform; Datascape never creates or deletes it.

connectionRef.description: SecretReference describing how to reach an external source. Required when external.

additionalProperties.description: Engine-specific block named after spec.engine (e.g. postgres: {database, schema}).
